Name: TrickRabbitSnow
Notes: An individual Star Bunny used in a chasing minigame that has to be linked to a TrickRabbitSnowCollect.

SW_A.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.

LinkNamePos.Description: Additional placements that need to be linked to the object.

Values.Notes: Position where the bunny appears from

Message.Description: The text message ID to be used. Needs to be specified in the zone's text file.
